response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but his resume lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust (with only minimal C/C++ exposure in legacy systems). His geospatial experience is limited to a personal project (GISCollective), and his background in low-latency or distributed systems is not explicitly demonstrated. However, his problem-solving approach, willingness to learn, and contributions to open-source projects suggest adaptability.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and experimentation skills (evidenced by workshops, open-source contributions, and diverse tech stack)
Experience with distributed systems and high-performance applications (Dlang at Dunnhumby, micro-services at Sociomantic)
Proven ability to learn new technologies quickly (shifted from PHP to Dlang, Node.js, and modern stacks)
concerns: No direct experience with C++ or Rust required for the role (primary technologies)
Limited explicit geospatial/navigation data pipeline experience (only personal project GISCollective)
Recent career gap (October 2025 - Present) with no clear explanation or relevant activity

key_factors.factor: Problem-solving and adaptability (diverse tech stack, open-source contributions)
